items.source: American Academy of Ophthalmology Preferred Practice Pattern: Primary Angle-Closure Disease
items.summary: Acute angle-closure glaucoma is vision-threatening and requires urgent evaluation. Severe eye pain with nausea/vomiting and halos is a classic emergency presentation.
items.license_note: Link only; store limited excerpts if needed.

items.source: American Academy of Ophthalmology – Eye Health: Eye Pain and Vision Changes
items.summary: AAO guidance identifies severe eye pain, vision changes, halos, and systemic symptoms as red flags requiring urgent ophthalmic or emergency evaluation.
items.license_note: Link only; store limited excerpts if needed.
